login.title: Aurasea
login.subtitle: Operational Intelligence for Hospitality
login.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before logging in
login.errorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts — please wait 5 minutes
login.errorUserNotFound: Account not found — contact your Owner for an invitation
login.errorGeneric: An error occurred — please try again

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: We sent a password reset link to {email}
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account
resetPassword.successMessage: You can now sign in with your new password
resetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again

accountSetup.title: We're setting up your account
accountSetup.message: Your account isn't connected to any organization yet. Please ask your Owner to resend the invitation.

home.recStart: Start entering data to receive recommendations
home.marginNoDataTooltip: No complete entries in the last 30 days — submit today's cost to see margin.

entryFnb.noCostWarning: No cost entered — Aurasea will estimate from historical data

settingsNotifications.title: Notifications
settingsNotifications.lineInstructions: Add Line OA "Aurasea" as a friend and send a message to connect your account

settingsBranches.title: Branches
settingsBranches.cutoffHint: Entries submitted before this time count as the previous day
settingsBranches.cutoffHintAccommodation:
Entries before 14:00 = last night's data.
Entries after 14:00 = tonight's data.
Ideal for hotels that enter data in the morning.
settingsBranches.cutoffHintFnb:
Entries before 05:00 = yesterday's data.
Entries after 05:00 = today's data.
Ideal for late-night venues entering data before bed.

settingsTargets.title: Targets
settingsTargets.salaryHint: All staff in this branch — visible to Owner only

settingsTeam.title: Team
settingsTeam.confirmRemove: Confirm removing this member from the team?

settingsBilling.title: Plan & Billing
settingsBilling.upgradeDescription: Unlock more features for your business
settingsBilling.mixedPriceNote: {price}/month · All features for both business types

planGate.description: Upgrade your plan to access this feature

recommendations.greatPerformance: Great performance! Maintain current pricing and strategy
recommendations.increaseDirectBooking: Try increasing direct bookings to reduce OTA commission
recommendations.marginLow: Margin below target — review ingredient costs and order volumes
recommendations.coversLow: Covers below target — consider promotions to drive traffic
recommendations.onTrack: Performance is on track — maintain current standards

noOrg.title: No organization
noOrg.message: Please contact an administrator to add you to an organization

trends.title: Trends
trends.gross_margin_note: Gross margin is revenue after variable cost, excluding salary — see net profit including salary in the Labour tab.
trends.net_margin_note: Margin shown after both variable costs and salary.
trends.net_margin_rolling_note: {window}-day rolling margin after variable costs and salary. Days without entries are skipped, not treated as zero.
trends.gross_margin_rolling_note: {window}-day rolling gross margin after variable costs. Days without entries are skipped, not treated as zero.
trends.gross_only_warning: Showing Gross Margin (excl. salary). Set monthly salary in Settings → Targets for accurate margin.
trends.manager_hint: Viewing last 7 days — 30/90-day history is for owners only
trends.salary_setup_hint: Set monthly salary in Settings → Targets to see Labour cost
trends.insight_fnb_both_below: Both Margin and Covers are below target — check COGS before opening today and consider adding lunch covers.
trends.insight_fnb_margin_below: Covers on target but Margin is {gap}pts below — likely COGS or waste. Check portion size.
trends.insight_fnb_covers_below: Margin is strong at {margin} but Covers are low — lift Covers without discounting (lunch set, weekday promo).
trends.insight_fnb_on_track: Margin and Covers on target — Avg Spend {current} vs target {target} is the next lever.
trends.insight_hotel_adr_high_occ_low: {period}-day avg ADR is {gap} above target — but Occupancy is still below. Try weekly packages or a walk-in special.
trends.insight_hotel_occ_ok_adr_low: Occupancy is near target at {occ} — but ADR is {gap} below. Lift prices on high-demand days.
trends.insight_hotel_both_below: ADR and Occupancy are both below target — open the Pricing tab to find the best ADR for the rooms you have available.
trends.insight_hotel_on_track: ADR and Occupancy on target over the last {period} days — check Labour cost and Channel mix for extra margin.

cost.title: Cost
cost.setup_salary_prompt: Set monthly salary in Settings → Targets to enable cost calculations

operationalCompleteness.label: Data completeness
operationalCompleteness.headline: Data completeness: {pct}%
operationalCompleteness.subtext: {days} of the last 30 days have complete entries.
operationalCompleteness.definition: A day is complete when sales and covers are both entered. Variable cost is tracked separately on the Cost tab.
operationalCompleteness.cta: → Go to Entry to fill missing days

costCoverage.label: Cost coverage
costCoverage.headline: Cost coverage: {pct}% over last 60 days
costCoverage.subtext: {covered} of {operational} operational days are covered by a cost entry within 7 days.
costCoverage.helper: Estimates improve as coverage rises. Batch purchases (e.g. weekly Makro runs) are fine — we credit the following 7 days. Closed days are excluded.
costCoverage.not_enough_data_sub: Enter sales to start tracking cost coverage.
costCoverage.explanation: A day counts as "covered" if a variable cost entry exists for that day or any of the 7 preceding days. This accounts for batch purchases that are normal in F&B.
costCoverage.closed_note: Closed days (no sales) are excluded from both numerator and denominator.
costCoverage.cta: → Go to Entry to add cost data

labour.title: Labour Cost
labour.owner_only: This tab is visible to Owner only
labour.above_breakeven_detail: Today's revenue {revenue} above breakeven {breakeven} — Labour cost {labourPct} on target
labour.below_breakeven_detail: Today's revenue {revenue} is below breakeven {breakeven} — need {gap} more revenue to bring Labour% to target
labour.waste_desc: If Labour% stayed at target {target} every day, estimated saving over 30 days
labour.setup_prompt: Set monthly salary in Settings → Targets

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.no_second_branch: Portfolio shows when you have 2 or more branches
portfolio.insight_template: {best} is performing best with a score of {score} — {worst} needs attention
portfolio.insight_template_with_issue: {best} is performing best with a score of {score} — {worst} needs attention ({issue})
portfolio.action_labour_all: All {count} branches: review shift schedules to reduce Labour%
portfolio.action_labour_one: {branch}: adjust shifts to lower labour cost
portfolio.action_labour_ok: All branches: Labour% on target — keep it up
portfolio.action_best_branch: {branch}: {metric} strong — look for ways to extend the margin
